steps.title: Turn the function values into points
steps.content: $h(30)=18$ gives the point $(30,18)$, and $h(28)=23$ gives the point $(28,23)$.

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content:
$$h(x)=-\frac{5}{2}x+93$$
This equation uses the slope from the two given function values and the intercept found by substitution. It matches choice D, the correct answer.
